SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-13-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-01-2021 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF NATALIE ANN PERAZA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FOUZIA ZAHEER IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT OF $450. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE FEB-01-2021 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE OR THE AGREEMENT IS BROKEN. IF NO APPEARANCE THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
